title: Resolution Approving and Adopting the Municipal School Board Resolution No. 2023-02 Dated February 1, 2023 Entitled "resolution Approving the Reversion of Funds for the Procurement of Sound System for Various Schools Amounting to Nine Hundred Ninety Thousand Pesos (P 990,000.00) From Capital Outlay to Maintenance and Other Operating Expense and for the Procurement of Anklung Equipment for the Los Baños National Highschool-batong Malake Campus Amounting to Fifty-six Thousand Pesos (P 56,000.00) F
